arts.ttl: Roma XI vs Porto – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: AS Roma travel to take on FC Porto in the Europa League’s play-off round this evening. The two teams started the season among the favourites for success in this competition but missed out on automatic qualification to the Round of 16. arts.ttl: Europa League | Porto v Roma: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Porto manager Martin Anselmi is expected to maintain his preferred back-three system as his team prepares to face Roma in the first leg of their Europa League playoff. The Portuguese side will likely line up in a 3-4-2-1 formation, with goalkeeper Diogo Costa anchoring the defence. arts.ttl: Roma Goalie Updates on Much-Awaited Contract Extension
arts.sum: Mile Svilar has been waiting for Roma and his camp to come to terms on a renewal for a long time at this point. The agreement should finally be reached before the end of the season. He makes €900k and has a few suitors across Europe, especially in England. The post Roma Goalie Updates on Much-Awaited Contract Extension appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: “Pellegrini Is a Starter for Me”: Ranieri Speaks Ahead of Porto-Roma Clash
arts.sum: Claudio Ranieri addressed the media in a press conference on the eve of Roma's Europa League playoff match against Porto. The Italian coach discussed his expectations for the game, the qualities of his opponents, and his team's current challenges, including the role of Lorenzo Pellegrini and Roma's struggles away from home.
